// A single-line comment exercises the short form.

[[overview,Overview anchor]]
== Overview

This paragraph uses {project-name}, {uri-home}[the project site],
*strong*, **unconstrained strong**, _emphasis_, __wide emphasis__,
`monospace`, ``wide monospace``, #marked#, H~2~O, and x^2^.

Typographic quotes include "`double quoted`" and '`single quoted`'.
An entity &copy;, mailto:fixture@example.test[email], and
xref:details.adoc#deep-link[an xref] exercise inline macros.
See <<tables,Tables>>, footnote:[A compact note], and kbd:[Ctrl+C].
Use menu:File[New > Document], btn:[Save], and image:rocket.png[🚀].
Math appears as stem:[sqrt(4) = 2] and pass:[<span>raw café</span>].

'''

----

== AsciiDoc source blocks

[source,javascript]
----
/* Embedded block comment
   remains active across lines and closes here. */
const message = `café λ 東京 ${"🚀 𝌆"}`;
const route = /^\/api\/[\p{Letter}-]+$/u;
console.log(message, route.test("/api/café"));
----

[source,rust]
----
fn main() { println!("café λ 東京 🚀 𝌆"); }
----

[source,sql]
----
SELECT id, display_name FROM accounts
WHERE display_name LIKE 'café%' ORDER BY created_at DESC;
----

[source,yaml]
----
service:
  name: "東京"
  labels: [café, λ, "🚀", "𝌆"]
----

[source,json]
----
{"name":"café λ 東京","symbols":["🚀","𝌆"],"active":true}
----

[source,html]
----
<!doctype html>
<p lang="en" data-city="東京">café λ 🚀 𝌆</p>
----

[source,css]
----
:root { --label: "café λ 東京 🚀 𝌆"; }
.fixture::before { content: var(--label); }
----

[source,shell]
----
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
printf '%s\n' 'café λ 東京 🚀 𝌆'
----

[source,xml]
----
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fixture city="東京">café λ 🚀 𝌆</fixture>
----

== Markdown-style source fences

```typescript
interface Greeting {
  text: string;
  symbols: readonly string[];
}
const greeting: Greeting = {
  text: "café λ 東京",
  symbols: ["🚀", "𝌆"],
};
```

```java
final class Greeting {
    static String text() { return "café λ 東京 🚀 𝌆"; }
}
```

```kotlin
data class Greeting(val text: String)
fun main() = println(Greeting("café λ 東京 🚀 𝌆"))
```
